entities.name: Weekly Strategic Review
entities.context: Phase 3 of the Strategic Partner system; provides structured time for revisiting, reflecting, reconciling, and resolving strategic thinking

entities.name: Strategic Partner
entities.context: Phase 1 of the Strategic Partner system; handles strategic thinking

entities.name: Reflection Synthesizer
entities.context: Phase 2 of the Strategic Partner system; produces structured outputs

entities.name: Strategic Partner system
entities.context: Three-phase system for strategic thinking, structured outputs, and long-term processing

entities.name: Strategic thinking
entities.context: Phase 1 focus; the initial strategic ideation that may not resolve in a single session

entities.name: Structured outputs
entities.context: Phase 2 focus; formatted results from strategic thinking

entities.name: Long-term processing
entities.context: Phase 3 focus; allowing contradictions, patterns, and decisions time and space to mature

relationships.context: Phase 3 component that closes the loop on the three-phase system
Phase 3 enables long-term processing of unresolved strategic thinking
